comments: The last 15 minutes of the show are missing. Only three of the four Thin Lizzy session tracks are on the tape, 'It’s Only Money' would have been played. Motörhead's 'Dance' was not played on the repeat of their FRS session 30 January 1981.

transcript.text: On 275 and 285. Also in stereo on VHF. This is National Radio 1.
I didn't shoot him.
Well, hello there. This is TV on the Radio. Thomas the Vance here. And welcome once again to the Friday Rock Show.
And this Friday PM, we've got a few gems for you. You're gonna hear four numbers by that subtle little trio called Motörhead.
And out of the archives circa 1974, a session by that ace band called Thin Lizzy.
And we've got some classic cuts by The Who, by The Tangs, by Dave Gilmour, by Queen, Tom Petty, Jimi Hendrix, among others.
And some new stuff from G-Force, Girl School, Hell and Back, and Black Sabbath.
Not forgetting our Friday Night Connection, the answer to the one we said a fortnight ago, and a brand new one.
But this evening, we start with this.
But they left a tasty little legacy of music, that band, by the name of G-Force.
